name: zinput_bindmap_system_init
description: zInput::BindMapSystem_Init creates the root bind-map context, initializes command storage, and populates keyboard, joystick, and mouse name tables.
known_limits: The smokes verify root context creation, overlay push/pop behavior, and default bind-group accessors. Binary-safe verification remains pending for exact allocation, constructor-free setup, and name-table call scheduling.
